center.name: 下迪邦谷县
center.summary: 下迪邦谷县是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括金喉拟啄木鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: The golden-throated barbet (Psilopogon franklinii) is an Asian barbet native to Southeast Asia, where it inhabits foremost forests between altitude
